expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory
At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: Duplicate Code, Shotgun Surgery, Alternative Classes with Different Interfaces, Divergent Change, Lazy Class, Speculative Generality, Comments as Crutch, Primitive Obsession, Parallel Inheritance Hierarchies

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside scope
Report includes an overall smell density rating
Agent did not modify source files

expectations.evidence: Line ranges, file counts, blast radius estimates throughout
